children.heading: Contract defined
children.label: a Contract defined
children.text: For the purposes of , the term “contract” shall include compacts and funding agreements entered into under this subchapter.section 5331 of this title

children.heading: Applicability of certain laws
children.label: b Applicability of certain laws
children.text: and , shall not apply to attorney and other professional contracts entered into by Indian tribes participating in self-governance under this subchapter.Section 81 of this titlesection 5123 of this title
